query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "TMC"."Impact Analysis" (id serial PRIMARY KEY, "InitiativeID" text, "Source" text, "program" text, "Portfolio" text, "title" text, "owner" text, "Nature_on_Impact" text, "Sector" text, "Impacted_BU" text, "Impact_Justification" text, "Culture" text, "Skills" text, "Skills_Description" text, "Org_Design" text, "Org_Design_Description" text, "Technology" text, "Technology_Description" text, "Processes" text, "Processes_Description" text, "OverAll_Impact" text, "Risk" text, "Risk_mitigation" text, created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now());
